item.title: One Multi-Stick, Four Easy Makeup Uses
item.description: One product, four ways! Use a multi-stick on your eyes, cheeks, nose, and lips to get that perfect, sun-kissed dimension...

item.title: Reverse Smoky Eye for Hooded Eyes
item.description: Reverse smoky eye for hooded eyes. Product used: MAKEUPBYMARIO Master Mattes Eyeshadow Palette – The Original UrbanDecay 24/7 Glide-On Waterproof Eyeliner Pencil L’Oréal Extensionist Lengthening and Curling Mascara

item.title: Spot Correct for a Skin-Like Finish
item.description: Stop using concealer as foundation! Spot correct your scars and dark circles for a fresh, skin-like finish that lasts all day

item.title: Recreating Janhvi Kapoor’s Pre-Wedding Look
